question_text: State the typical speed of sound in air at room temperature.
correct_answer: Approximately 330 m/s or 340 m/s (accept range 320–350 m/s)
explanation: The speed of sound in air at room temperature is approximately 330–340 m/s. This is an important fact to remember for Year 8 physics. Sound travels slower in air than in solids or liquids.
